Metadata.title: India Med Service | Medical Treatment in India
Metadata.description: India Med Service — connect with top hospitals & expert doctors in India. Affordable surgery, medical visa support, and complete care for international patients.
Metadata.keywords: India Med Service, India Med, medical treatment India, best hospitals India, medical tourism India, surgery India, medical visa India

Hero.heading_main: Affordable Medical Treatment in India with
Hero.description: Looking for medical treatment in India? We help you compare treatment costs in India, choose top hospitals and get complete visa & patient support.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
WhyChooseUs.header_desc: Trusted by international patients worldwide, India delivers advanced healthcare backed by expert doctors and complete care support.
WhyChooseUs.reason_1_desc: JCI & NABH accredited hospitals ensuring top global safety and care.
WhyChooseUs.reason_2_desc: Up to 70–80% lower treatment costs compared to Western countries.
WhyChooseUs.reason_3_desc: Internationally trained specialists with years of proven expertise.
WhyChooseUs.reason_4_desc: End-to-end support: travel, visa, treatment, and recovery care.

hospitals.medanta_desc: World-class multi-super specialty hospital known for advanced cardiac and robotic surgeries.
hospitals.fortis_desc: Premium quaternary care hospital with state-of-the-art medical technology and international standards.
hospitals.artemis_desc: First JCI & NABH accredited hospital in Gurgaon, providing depth of expertise in advanced medical interventions.
hospitals.max_desc: Renowned for oncology, cardiology, and neurosciences with top-tier healthcare professionals.
hospitals.paras_desc: Leader in neurosciences and joint replacement, providing specialized care at accessible price points.
hospitals.marengo_desc: Modern multi-specialty facility offering high-end clinical care and a patient-centric approach.
hospitals.indiamed_lucknow_desc: Spread across an area of 12.58 acres, Medanta Lucknow is one of the largest multi-super-specialty hospitals.
hospitals.jay_prabha_desc: Established in 2020, this super-specialty hospital began operations with an Out-Patient Department (OPD).

FeaturedDestination.title: Featured Destination
FeaturedDestination.desc: Trusted by international patients worldwide, India delivers advanced healthcare backed by expert doctors, modern facilities, and complete care and support at every step of the treatment journey.

ModelOfCare.title: India Med Model of Care
ModelOfCare.step_1_desc: India Med delivers high-quality, integrated care through expert clinicians, a doctor-led approach, and strong multispecialty collaboration.
ModelOfCare.step_2_desc: India Med provides advanced infrastructure, high OT & ICU capacity, and strict infection control to support complex care and faster patient recovery.
ModelOfCare.step_3_desc: India Med delivers advanced tertiary and quaternary care using cutting-edge technology, enabling doctors to perform complex diagnostics and treatments with precision.
ModelOfCare.step_4_desc: India Med uses advanced digital solutions to improve access and quality of care, supported by uniform clinical standards that ensure safe, effective treatment.
ModelOfCare.step_5_desc: India Med delivers advanced healthcare through integrated centres of excellence, combining care, research, and learning with a patient-first philosophy.

Leadership.title: Leadership
Leadership.faisal_title: Founder & Managing Director – India Med Service
Leadership.faisal_bio_1: Mr. Faisal Iqbal is the Founder and Director of India Med Service, a trusted medical facilitation company specializing in organizing treatment for international patients in India. With over 6 years of experience in the healthcare coordination sector, he has successfully assisted more than 1,750 patients from various countries in accessing high-quality medical care.
Leadership.faisal_bio_2: He is highly experienced in coordinating end-to-end medical journeys, including hospital selection, doctor consultations, treatment planning, and patient support. Mr. Faisal personally ensures smooth communication between patients, hospitals, and medical professionals.
Leadership.faisal_bio_3: Under his leadership, India Med Service has built strong collaborations with leading hospitals and specialists across India, delivering reliable, transparent, and patient-focused services.
Leadership.daniyar_bio: Daniyar Aydimirov oversees patient coordination in Kazakhstan, providing dedicated support to international patients. He has assisted over 1,000 patients and ensures smooth communication in Russian, Kazakh, and Uzbek, with a strong focus on patient care and trust.
achievements_list: 6+ years of experience in medical facilitation
Strong network with top hospitals across India

FAQ.title: FAQs
FAQ.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.book_desc: If you have any questions, just book a 15-minute call with us.
FAQ.q1: How does India Med help with medical treatments?
FAQ.a1: India Med connects you with top-tier healthcare providers, helps compare treatment options, and provides support throughout your medical journey.
FAQ.q2: What specialties does India Med cover?
FAQ.a2: We cover a wide range of specialties including Cardiology, Oncology, Orthopedics, and more.
FAQ.q3: How can I get a treatment quote?
FAQ.a3: You can upload your medical reports through our portal, and our experts will provide a detailed cost estimate within 24-48 hours.
FAQ.q4: Does India Med offer international patient services?
FAQ.a4: Yes, we provide full concierge services including visa assistance, airport transfers, and language interpretation.
FAQ.q5: How do I schedule an appointment with a doctor?
FAQ.a5: Simply book a call through our website or use the appointment feature to select your preferred specialist.
